$comment: Maps the human-readable labels in a task blob to the closed vocabularies task.toml requires. validate_task_fields is a blocking CI check, so Claude must never guess these.

category.$comment: task.toml [metadata] category — exactly one of the 9. Key = label as it appears in the blob (case-insensitive).

$blocked.$comment: Snorkel is currently NOT accepting tasks in these categories. A task that resolves to one of them is rejected at parse time, before any build starts — finding this out after a 45-minute build would be pure waste.

subcategory.$comment: task.toml [metadata] subcategories — zero or more. long_context carries an extra bar: >=50k tokens of real prose, not grep-solvable.

language.$comment: task.toml [metadata] languages. Free-form, but normalized so the same language never appears under two spellings. NOTE: never add python here just because the verifier tests are pytest — that is an explicit doc rule.
